title: Nebelia aspera
taxonomy: Nebelia aspera is a species of marine planktonic ciliate, and it belongs to the phylum Ciliophora. More specifically, it is classified as a member of the class Karyoreliea. Within the class Karyoreliea, Nebelia aspera is assigned to the order Karyorelieida. The family and genus to which Nebelia aspera belongs is Hypotrixiidae and Nebelia respectively. This classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.

intro:
There is no information available about "Nebelia aspera" being a known plant species. However, based on the available information about "Nebelia" being a genus of small, freshwater sponges, I found some information about a plant called "Nelumbo aspera" that is also known as the "Chinese water lily".
